reference: Under my ribs on the right side is hurting when I breathe, cough, or even clear my throat. I got choked on some meat Wednesday night, and this right side has hurt since, but it has been worse today. I had to leave work at nine a.m. this morning. I don't know if it is the spleen or if I have cracked a rib when I was coughing so hard while choking.
text: Under my ribs on the right side, it's hurting. I can't breathe. I cough. I can't even clear my throat. I got choked on some meat Wednesday night. This right side is worse since, but it has been worse today. I had the weak word in my head this morning. I don't know if it is the spleen, or if I had cracked a rib when I was coughing so hard while choking.
